intro:
I couldn't find any information about the plant "Triticum muticum hybernum". However, I can give you information about Triticum aestivum, which is the common wheat plant. 

Triticum aestivum is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and the genus Triticum. It is a cool-season crop that is widely cultivated for its edible grains, providing various health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Triticum aestivum include polyphenols, flavonoids, and phytic acid, which have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and cardiovascular-protective properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Triticum aestivum include wheat bran, wheat germ, and whole wheat flour, which are used in baking and cooking.
